title: G7 meets in France to narrow transatlantic Iran split
summary_full: The two-day gathering at the Vaux-de-Cernay Abbey comes as the White House said President Donald Trump is ready to "unleash hell" if Iran does not accept a deal to end the war
summary_public: The two-day gathering at the Vaux-de-Cernay Abbey comes as the White House said President Donald Trump is ready to "unleash hell" if Iran does not accept a deal to end the war
